content: Confirm which domains are affected by the cto/67f24fd5 output and whether their Owns/Does-Not-Own boundaries were respected: orchestrator-role/SKILL.md and earned-constraints.md are Platform/PMCR-O files, not any single domain's own SKILL.md -- cto's domain scope covers 'PMCR-O loop/skill-pack design and validation', so this was in-bounds for cto to make, not an overreach into another domain's territory. Success condition: explicit statement of which domain owns what, not assumed.
Verify the two target files' current on-disk state matches exactly what trail cto/67f24fd5's 01-make.jsonl claims was written (EC-VERIFY-FIRST-001) before authorizing any git action against them.
Re-check git status to confirm scope is limited to exactly these two files -- no unrelated drift since the last commit.
If verification passes, execute git add + commit + push for the two files as the human-authorized TYPE1 action this cycle exists to approve. Success condition: push confirmed against origin/main.
